- The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included.

Event does not qualify:

Postponement:

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Trump
markets.rules_primary: If Kathy Hochul says Trump as part of next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement will be used.

Payout Criterion:
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purposes of this market, “next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement” refers to the first livestream on the Governor Kathy Hochul main YouTube channel (@GovernorKathyHochul) after March 10th, 2026 at 9:00 PM ET.
The livestream will resolve based on Kathy Hochul speaking in an official capacity. If Kathy Hochul is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).
Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if the Governor Kathy Hochul ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event.
The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.
markets.title: What will Kathy Hochul say during next Governor Kathy Hochul announcement?
markets.yes_sub_title: Trump
